hero.body: [de] Pick a framework. Configure. Launch in 60 seconds. No code required, no infrastructure to manage. 4 frameworks, 20+ platforms, free tier with BYOK.

agentDiscovery.heading: [de] Command an army of subagents
agentDiscovery.body: [de] Your local coding agent becomes a fleet commander. Paste this prompt — it registers on Hatcher in your name, spins up always-on subagents (Telegram bots, research loops, Discord mods, monitors), and keeps controlling them long after your session ends.
agentDiscovery.step01: [de] Send this prompt to your AI coding agent — Claude Code, Cursor, OpenClaw, Hermes, or any agent that can fetch URLs and run shell commands.
agentDiscovery.step02: [de] Agent registers an account with your email and sends you a verification link.
agentDiscovery.step03: [de] Click verify. Your agent picks a template, deploys, and hands you a running AI.

howItWorks.heading: [de] 3 steps. 60 seconds.
howItWorks.subheading: [de] No coding, no setup guides, no configuration files.

steps.title: [de] Pick a framework
steps.desc: [de] OpenClaw, Hermes, ElizaOS, or Milady. Each has unique strengths — browser control, memory, multi-agent, on-chain.

steps.title: [de] Configure
steps.desc: [de] Name, personality, integrations. Fill a simple form — no config files, no YAML.

steps.title: [de] Deploy
steps.desc: [de] One click. Your agent is live on every connected platform in under 60 seconds.

items.a: [de] Yes. The free plan gives you 1 agent, 20 messages per day, and access to all platforms. No credit card required. BYOK (bring your own LLM key) = unlimited messages on any tier.

items.q: [de] Do I need to know how to code?
items.a: [de] Not at all! Creating an agent is like filling out a form — choose a name, describe what you want it to do, pick platforms, and launch.
[de] Connect your own OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, or Groq key for unlimited messages. You only pay your AI provider directly.
[de] On our cloud servers 24/7. No need to keep your computer on or install anything.

integrations.heading: [de] All Integrations Free
integrations.body: [de] Telegram, Discord, WhatsApp, Slack, Signal, iMessage, and 14+ more platforms are included free on all tiers. No extra charge, ever.
integrations.note: [de] All prices in USD, payable in SOL or $HATCHER. BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) = unlimited messages with your own LLM API key on any tier.

compareTable.heading: [de] Compare Plans
compareTable.subheading: [de] See what each tier includes at a glance

items.q: [de] What is BYOK (Bring Your Own Key)?
items.a: [de] BYOK lets you use your own API key for any LLM provider (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, xAI, Groq, OpenRouter). This is always free on all tiers -- you pay the provider directly, no Hatcher markup. Messages with your own key are unlimited.
[de] Add-ons are stackable on any tier. For example, if you are on the Starter tier (1 agent) and purchase a +3 Agents add-on, you can run 4 agents total. You can stack multiple add-ons.

items.q: [de] What is the difference between shared and dedicated resources?
items.a: [de] Shared resources mean your agent shares CPU and RAM with others on the same server -- still performant but may vary under load. Dedicated resources (Pro and Business) give your agent guaranteed CPU and RAM that no one else can use.
[de] You can pay with SOL or $HATCHER. Prices are listed in USD and converted at live rates via Jupiter.
[de] Yes. You can cancel your subscription at any time and your tier will revert to Free at the end of the billing period. Agents beyond your free limit will be paused.

[de] Free agents sleep after 1 hour of inactivity, Starter after 4 hours, Pro after 12 hours. Business and Founding Member agents are always-on with no auto-sleep. They wake instantly on the next message. You can add Always On to any agent for $7.99/mo.

items.q: [de] What LLM do I get with the free tier?
items.a: [de] Free and Starter tiers use GPT-OSS 20B on Groq. Pro, Business, and Founding Member tiers get Llama 3.3 70B on Groq — a more capable model. Message limits are account-wide: Free 20/day, Starter 50/day, Pro 100/day, Business 300/day, Founding 300/day. BYOK (bring your own LLM key) bypasses all limits on any tier.

items.q: [de] What is the Founding Member tier?
items.a: [de] Founding Member is a one-time $99 payment that gives you lifetime access to Hatcher: 10 agents, 300 messages/day, 4 GB RAM, 2 GB workspace, always-on, and all premium features (File Manager, Full Logs, priority support) included. No monthly fees, ever. Limited to 20 spots — once they are gone, this tier is gone.

cta.heading: [de] Ready to deploy your agent?
cta.body: [de] Pick your framework, choose a template, and deploy in seconds. Start free with a built-in LLM. Upgrade when you need more power.

pricing.footerNote: [de] All prices in USD, payable in SOL or $HATCHER. BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) = unlimited messages with your own LLM API key on any tier.
